title: Find Bias Features
text: BiasDetect R package. Install development version GitHub:

title: Find Bias Features
text: Install additional required packages running package codes. Load additional packages. dplyr package widely used vignettes conduct data wrangling specific information extraction.
code: pkgs <- c("dplyr", "tidyr", "scran", "scry", "nnSVG") required_pkgs <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages())] BiocManager::install(required_pkgs) library(BiasDetect)

title: Authors and Citation
text: Hou C, Thompson J, Hicks S (2024). BiasDetect: Find Biased Features. R package version 0.99.0, https://github.com/christinehou11/BiasDetect, https://christinehou11.github.io/BiasDetect/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {BiasDetect: Find Biased Features},   author = {Christine Hou and Jacqui Thompson and Stephanie C. Hicks},   year = {2024},   note = {R package version 0.99.0, https://github.com/christinehou11/BiasDetect},   url = {https://christinehou11.github.io/BiasDetect/}, }

title: Find Biased Features
text: BiasDetect feature-based Quality Control (QC) bias genes identification spatial transcriptomics snRNA-seq data types batch effect. BiasDetect method based binomial deviance model (Townes et al, 2019) applies cutoffs based standard deviation (SD) deviance rank difference metrics data-driven thresholding approach find batch-biased features.

title: Find Biased Features
text: BiasDetect R package available Bioconductor version 3.19 later. can install BiasDetect using following commands R session Bioconductor: Additionally, can install development version GitHub: Install additional required packages running package codes vignettes.
code: if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))     install.packages("BiocManager")  BiocManager::install("BiasDetect")  ## Check Bioconductor installation BiocManager::valid() BiocManager::install("christinehou11/BiasDetect") pkgs <- c("dplyr", "tidyr", "scran", "scry", "nnSVG") required_pkgs <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages())] BiocManager::install(required_pkgs)

title: Find Biased Features
text: detailed tutorial available Find Biased Features written Jacqui Thompson.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
text: Function run 'BiasDetect' method spatially variable genes (SVGs) identification spatial-resolved transcriptomics (SRT) data types batch effect.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
code: biasDetect(   input,   batch_effect = NULL,   VGs = NULL,   nSD_dev = 5,   nSD_rank = 5,   visual = FALSE )

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
text: input SpatialExperiment SingleCellExperiment: Input data can either SpatialExperiment SingleCellExperiment. assumed assays slot containing counts assay devianceFeatureSelection() successfully operate calculate deviance rank. logcounts strongly recommended included assays. Also, input data assumed set rownames(input) genes gene_name rowData(input). batch_effect character: either batch slide subject based metadata available within input data. name slide subject within input object specified based different scenarios. VGs character: highly variable genes (HVGs) SingleCelleExperiment object spatially variable genes (SVGs) SpatialExperiment object. data frame, assumed contain one column identified variable genes column name "gene_name". nSD_dev integer: number standard deviation (nSD) deviance difference. default value 5. nSD_rank integer: number standard deviation (nSD) rank difference. default value 5. visual logical: Whether display detected bias genes visualizations deviance rank. Default = FALSE return data frame. TRUE, returned format two parallel plots presenting bias genes based nSD_dev nSD_rank.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
text: input provided SpatialExperiment SingleCellExperiment object, output values returned either data frame two parallel plots present identified bias genes.

title: Find Bias Genes — biasDetect
code: # \donttest{ set.seed(123) spe <- load("inst/data/spe_norm.Rdata") #> Warning: cannot open compressed file 'inst/data/spe_norm.Rdata', probable reason 'No such file or directory' #> Error in readChar(con, 5L, useBytes = TRUE): cannot open the connection libd <- read.csv("inst/data/libd-all_nnSVG_p-05-features-df.csv/") #> Warning: cannot open file 'inst/data/libd-all_nnSVG_p-05-features-df.csv/': No such file or directory #> Error in file(file, "rt"): cannot open the connection SVGs <- libd$gene_name #> Error in eval(expr, envir, enclos): object 'libd' not found biasDetect(spe, batch_effect = "brain", VGs = SVGs, nSD_dev = 5,         nSD_rank = 6, visual = FALSE) #> Error in eval(expr, envir, enclos): object 'spe' not found  biasDetect(spe, batch_effect = "brain", VGs = SVGs, nSD_dev = 5,         nSD_rank = 6, visual = TRUE) #> Error in eval(expr, envir, enclos): object 'spe' not found # }
